data.title: Today, the US Bitcoin ETF has a net outflow of 2,467 BTC, and the Ethereum ETF has a net outflow of 3,691 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, today 10 US Bitcoin ETFs had a net outflow of 2,467 BTC (US$236.74 million), of which Fidelity had an outflow of 1,048 BTC (US$100.58 million), and Fidelity currently holds 208,525 BTC (US$20.01 billion); nine Ethereum ETFs had a net outflow of 3,691 ETH (US$9.82 million), of which Fidelity had an outflow of 3,999 ETH (US$10.64 million), and Fidelity currently holds 450,905 ETH (US$1.2 billion).

data.title: Solayer (LAYER) will be listed on Bitget PoolX soon
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget PoolX is about to launch Solayer (LAYER), with a total prize pool of 33,700 LAYER. The upper limit of personal lock-up is 555,600 LAYER, and the lock-up opening time is from 22:00 on February 13 to 22:00 on February 20 (UTC+8).

data.title: Chainalysis: Driven by "pig-killing" and AI, the total amount of cryptocurrency fraud in 2024 has reached $9.9 billion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Blockchain research company Chainalysis warned in a report that as cybercriminals use artificial intelligence and become more organized, "pig killing" scams have surged, and cryptocurrency fraud revenues are estimated to have hit a record high last year. According to its preliminary estimates, crypto wallets associated with fraud received $9.9 billion in cryptocurrencies in 2024. The company predicts that as Chainalysis discovers more fraud wallets, the 2024 figure will grow to a record $12.4 billion. The main reason for the increase in fraud revenue is the prevalence of "pig killing" scams. In addition, scammers prefer to target more victims at the expense of smaller payments. (CNBC)

data.title: On-chain trading platform Mintify acquires Magically to expand digital asset consumer application ecosystem
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Mintify, an on-chain trading platform, announced the acquisition of Magically to expand the digital asset consumer application ecosystem. It is reported that this is Mintify's first major acquisition, but the specific acquisition amount was not disclosed. It is reported that Mintify has established a strategic relationship with the Redacted team through this acquisition, and its consumer-centric on-chain product and service ecosystem will be further expanded. In addition, Magically users and partners will be able to participate in Mintify's consumer application ecosystem and the token $MINT that will be launched on Solana.

data.title: Trump To Hold Press Conference On Reciprocal Tariffs
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump announced that he will hold a press conference on reciprocal tariffs today at 1 PM, which corresponds to 2 AM tomorrow in Beijing time (UTC+8).

data.title: BNB funding rates on Binance and OKX hit -0.0221% and -0.02019% respectively
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the market, the current funding rates of BNB on Binance and OKX have reached -0.0221% and -0.02019% respectively.
It is reported that long positions and short positions usually have to exchange funding rates at the next funding rate time point. If the rate is positive, the long position pays the short position. If the rate is negative, the short position pays the long position.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 730 USDT with a 14.43% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 13, 2025, 13:36 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 730 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 730.640015 USDT, with a narrowed 14.43% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: U.S. Short-Term Interest Rate Futures Remain Steady After PPI Release
data.description: According to PANews, following the release of the Producer Price Index (PPI), U.S. short-term interest rate futures showed little change. The market continues to widely anticipate that the Federal Reserve will maintain its policy rate unchanged until September.

data.title: PPI exceeded expectations, but the market still expects the Fed to remain on hold until September
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: After the release of PPI, US short-term interest rate futures did not change much, and the market still generally expects the Federal Reserve to keep the policy interest rate unchanged until September. (Jinshi)
